params.contentCID: IPFS CID of the full content JSON
params.title: Post title (stored on-chain for indexing)

returns._0: id The ID of the created post

params.limit: Max number of posts to return

getPost(uint256).notice: Get a single post by ID

getPostCount().notice: Get total number of posts (including deleted)

getPosts(uint256,uint256).notice: Batch fetch post summaries (for listing pages)

togglePin(uint256).notice: Toggle pin status of a post

transferOwnership(address).notice: Transfer ownership to a new address
